rationale.fidelity: Explicitly preserves the same offline facility-location decisions, constraints, objective, and optimum while mapping Benders quantities correctly.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides the planner, trigger, decisions, stakes, scale trade-off, monolithic counterfactual, and operational planning-budget implication.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Defines a bounded computational research contribution and comparator, though not a traceable literature gap.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels scalability as an inference and specifies a rigorous benchmark design without asserting untested performance.
rationale.prose_clarity: Technically clear but overly long and templated, with persistent encoding defects.
rationale.overall: An excellent full business brief on computational scalability, limited primarily by prose economy and rendering.
